title: Gender parity over time
detail: Gender parity has improved by 0.06 points between 2015 and 2026.

title: Platform diversity gap
detail: Amazon Prime leads on diversity (0.73) while Hbo Max trails (0.70).

title: Genre lead-role skew
detail: Action has the highest male lead share at 74% of lead roles.

title: Dialogue gap by genre
detail: In action, female characters average 26% fewer dialogue words than male characters.

title: Intersectional representation
detail: Women of color hold 15% of lead roles across the dataset.

title: Interaction homophily
detail: Gender homophily in interaction networks is 0.04 (positive values mean characters interact mostly within their own group).
